title: Amadria Park Transfers | Fixed Prices | TAXI Antonio
description: Private transfers to and from Amadria Park Šibenik, hotels and camp. Fixed prices booked in advance: Split Airport €95, Zadar Airport €130, Krka from €45. Door-to-door, one local driver.
keywords: amadria park transfers, amadria park taxi, amadria park sibenik transfer, amadria park airport transfer, taxi amadria park, solaris sibenik taxi

schema.serviceType: Hotel airport and city taxi transfers
schema.name: Amadria Park Šibenik Transfers
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi transfers to and from the Amadria Park resort in Šibenik, covering all resort hotels and the camp. Airport transfers, city-to-city transfers and Krka day trips, booked in advance at a price agreed upfront.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Fixed transfer prices from Amadria Park

itemListElement.name: Amadria Park to Krka National Park (Lozovac)

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Amadria Park to Split Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A private transfer from Amadria Park to Split Airport is a fixed 95 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, booked in advance. Tolls, fuel and luggage are included, and the price is the same in both directions.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from all Amadria Park hotels and the camp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I pick up at the door of every hotel in the resort and at the Amadria Park Camp reception, at the same fixed prices. Tell me your hotel name when booking and I will confirm the exact meeting point.

mainEntity.name: Should I book my Amadria Park transfer in advance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All the prices listed are fixed prices for transfers booked in advance. Booking ahead guarantees the car, the pickup time and the price, which matters most for early flights and high season.

mainEntity.name: Do you meet arriving guests at the airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. For arrivals I monitor your flight in real time, wait in the arrivals hall with a name sign, and drive you straight to your Amadria Park hotel or the camp. Waiting for delayed flights is free.

mainEntity.name: Can you take us from Amadria Park to Krka National Park?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. A one-way transfer to the Krka Lozovac entrance is 45 euros and to the Skradin entrance 50 euros. I also offer a full private day trip with waiting time included, with pickup at your Amadria Park hotel.

mainEntity.name: How do I pay for the transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
